title: Marble Mortar and Pestle Set Green 2.5" Inches Handmade Garlic Crusher & Grinder Bowl for Kitchen Mortar and Pestle Set - Herb Grinder Spice Grinder
description:
About this item
WHAT IS INCLUDED - 1 x Set of Mortar and Pestle. Comes Along With RADICALn Branded Secure Packaging.
MATERIAL - This Item Is Made Of Natural Marble, So The Color May Vary.
SIZE - Mortar 2.5'' Inches & Pestle 2.5'' Inches
VERSATILE - Ideal for grinding various ingredients, from spices and herbs to small grains or even making pastes and sauces.
STABLE - Provides stability during use, preventing the mortar from sliding or tipping over.
reviews_5s:
First, I love the tiny size. Great for smashing pills into powder (pet owners love this). Second, the entire set is made of onyx; the grinding part of the pestal is onyx, pills don't stick to it, nor do they stick to the onyx mortar. One of my cats, who is very tiny and cannot swallow pills, needs medicine twice daily. I just crush the pills to powder (no effort at all required) and add to her food. Third, I need to keep it on my kitchen counter where I prepare the cat's food, and it takes up such a tiny bit of space. The green/beige color is neutral and won't detract from your decor. The price was great also!Perfect size for the 1 pill I have to crush up daily. It's small, definitely check sizing but I wanted something small so it's perfect for me. Heavy, beautiful and good quality.The Radicaln Mortar and Pestle Set in Green Onyx is both stunning and highly functional! The craftsmanship is exceptional, with the natural green onyx adding a luxurious touch to my kitchen. It’s a beautiful piece that doubles as decor when not in use.

The set is sturdy and well-balanced, making it easy to grind spices, herbs, and even tougher ingredients like garlic and seeds. The smooth surface is easy to clean, and it doesn’t absorb odors or stains.

If you’re looking for a durable and elegant mortar and pestle, this set is a perfect choice. Highly recommend it for anyone who loves cooking or wants a gorgeous kitchen accessory!1. This marble is beautifully veined, similar to the one pictured in the add.
2. It works well to crush pills and spices.
3. It has a discrete felt pad on the bottom that protects counter surface.
4. Price is perfect for a small gift. 🎁This is a great size mortar and pestle- perfect for crushing nuts and herbs and it does not take up much space. Absolutely love it! Buying more for friends. The green marble is gorgeous.I needed something small to grind up eggshells for gardening purposes. It’s perfect to use for one/two eggs. I use it all the time and it’s really amazing how much it costs compared to the quality of the product. It’s beautiful and sturdy. It is pretty small but it’s exactly the size I wanted. Going to order more soon to give as gifts!I have been looking for a mortar and pestle that has a smooth interior so crushed pills won’t stick to it. This thing is not only amazing, but beautiful as well. It really does the job…quickly and perfectly. I would highly recommend this product to anyone who needs one for medications.The only thing I'm not a fan on is how smooth it is in the bowl so it take longer to crush what I need.

Still very happy with it.Ever prettier than the picture! Well made, works great, fast delivery. Highly recommended.One of the best things ever! Quality is great. Almost too pretty to use! In addition - it was the most well packaged product I've bought in quite some time. A+ all the way!!
reviews_1s:
TERRIBLE. Does not crush pills (for my mom) evenly and smoothly. The pestle doesn't seem to fit the mortar! It has areas that her medicine collects in, and she needs all of it crushed evenly. Really disappointed in this.As cute and dainty this mortar and pestle is. It is almost impossible to finely grind anything down to a fine powder. The bottom is flat, it should not be flat. It should be deep like a bowl, and there should never ever be edges in a mortar. The pestle can’t even get to the wall to grind anything. It just flings it around and you’re stuck mashing. If you do try to grind it’ll take you a half hour or longer to do something that should take not even a few minutes. I suggest a design change so that the bottom is more rounded out and deep and not flat, and that there are no edges because it creates a problem and is very frustrating.What a joke!! Haven’t even had this 2 months only using to crush pills for my mom and already broke and chipped!! What trash!Very pretty but it was absolutely useless for my purposes. The whole idea of a mortar and pestle obviously is to easily grind something into a fine powder but the grinding power comes from the unfinished surfaces rubbing against each other. Both pieces in this set are smoothly polished all over which defeats the purpose. I tried grinding a small pill with a shiny surface and all it did was cause the tablet to bounce around and nothing else. Maybe it would work on pills with an unglazed surface or possibility the pill I was trying to pulverize was too small or too hard. At any rate it was useless and did nothing. It is very pretty and the natural stone is obviously genuine but I guess I’ll have to get more details if I try to buy a different setPlay Video
I highly dislike the sizePoor quality control, A damaged mortar/pestle was shipped. It was packaged well but the bowl portion had a large gouge likely a manufacturing defect in it. I’m trying to return instead of exchange because the item will not work for me since not smooth and their QC is not goodIt looked good at first. But within 2 usages it got broken. Very disappointed with the quality. It's been only 10 days since I started using it. Would like to return ,unfortunately I don't have the original packing with me.Its a really beautiful pestle + mortar that goes well with granite kitchen countertops. However, that's the only high of this product as the life of the one I got only lasted a week at best. I was trying mask my cardamoms for tea and from the side, the mortar decided to chip off. Also, the pestle is obnoxiously built way too far for a mortar this small. See pictures and videos

I do not recommend this productI purchased this back in March (writing this review June 17th). I bought it to grind menthol crystals for when I shave. I’ve used half a dozen times, at very most. It broke right down the middle while using it. I didn’t drop it, I wasn’t smashing it down as hard as I can or anything like that. Not sure if it was defective, but I’m out of the refund period of course.The bottom of the mortar (bowl) has a smaller radius than the pestle. This leaves an area where the pestle won't reach and the product isn't crushed.
